typecheck.command: cd /Users/anant/ai/sre-agent-sandbox && uv run python -m py_compile sre_agent_sandbox/models.py && uv run python -m py_compile sre_agent_sandbox/chaos_engine.py && uv run python -m py_compile sre_agent_sandbox/simulated_system.py && uv run python -m py_compile sre_agent_sandbox/reward.py && uv run python -m py_compile sre_agent_sandbox/server/environment.py

blockingIssues.description: SREAction accepts coercible float values such as action_type=1.0 instead of strictly rejecting non-integer inputs.
SREObservation does not enforce required service and metric keys (api/order/db and cpu/memory/latency/request_count), allowing malformed shapes.
SimulatedSystem constructor leaves service state uninitialized, so querying a fresh instance can error before reset() and violates baseline-initialized expectation.
active_incidents can remain stale after rollback remediation because bad_config faults remain in chaos fault tracking after service recovery.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add an explicit checklist for strict model validation that includes coercion-rejection tests (e.g., 1.0 for integer fields) and nested key-shape enforcement for dict payloads.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review of pydantic-models found strict-validation gaps despite broad tests; current skill guidance is generic and did not require these specific assertions.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require lifecycle assertions for incident tracking in environment tests: faults must appear when active and be cleared after successful remediation.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review of sre-environment found recovered service health while active_incidents still reported stale bad_config faults.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document an explicit exception path for scaffolding/config-only features where red-green TDD is replaced with structure/manifest/command validation.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review of project-scaffolding passed but noted procedural friction because no behavior-level unit tests existed yet.

rejectedObservations.observation: Feature-level expected behavior around constructor initialization is not encoded strongly enough in assertions.
rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous; this is a feature-specific test design gap and not a clear shared-state update target.
